name: Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the low-calorie mayonnaise, lemon juice, chopped green onions, and tuna in a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped celery to the mixture.
3. Mix gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Serve on a bed of shredded lettuce.
5. Serves 6.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 131, Fat 4 g, Cholesterol 35 mg, Carbohydrate 1 g, Sodium 413 mg.
Exchanges: Meat 1, Fat 1.
